title: Nexus Mutual - Hugh Speaks Out
relevance_summary: Phishing attack targeting a user with a large balance, leading to the transfer of funds to a hacker.

prevention.rule: Block any tx that sends funds to a new address without prior approval or known history.
prevention.trigger: FUND_TRANSFER -> new recipient address without prior interaction

red_flags: Transfer of large amounts to unknown addresses
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that sends funds to a new address without prior approval or known history.
summary: Hugh Karp of Nexus Mutual was tricked into approving a transaction that sent 370,000 NXM to a hacker. A guard could have blocked the transaction by preventing fund transfers to new addresses without prior interaction.
